author: David Chen
reviewBody: We hired Mikey for our company holiday party and honestly didn't know what to expect. He walked around doing close-up magic during dinner and I watched our CFO—who never smiles—absolutely lose it when a card appeared in his wallet. Everyone kept asking how he did it. Best $5k we spent on the event.

author: Rachel & Tom
reviewBody: Mikey was at our wedding doing magic during cocktail hour while we did photos. My aunt called me the next day just to talk about him—she made him repeat a trick three times and still couldn't figure it out. Our guests are still bringing it up months later. Totally worth it.

author: Jennifer M.
reviewBody: I was skeptical about hiring a magician for our client appreciation dinner, but our VP insisted. Mikey was professional, didn't make it cheesy, and actually got our clients engaged and talking to each other. One of our newer clients said it was the best corporate event he'd been to. Definitely hiring him again.

author: Mike S.
reviewBody: My wife surprised me by booking Mikey for our wedding reception. I'm not usually into magic but this guy is legit—he did this thing with my wedding ring that I still can't explain. Our photographer got some great shots of people's reactions. Made the cocktail hour way more fun than just standing around.
